overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic urban plaza at dusk. The camera moves along a wet pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees and benches, then tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and neon lights against a deep blue evening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with palm trees and seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete pathway through the plaza, passing benches and planters

notable_agents.action: sitting on a concrete bench near a palm tree planter

entered.detail: green cylindrical trash receptacle with scattered debris nearby
tall palm tree in a raised concrete planter
black metal railing with wooden handrail running along the right side
modern concrete bench with metal supports
large glowing holographic advertisement showing a helmeted figure with text 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST'
tall building with brick facade covered in various neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a ground-level walk through a futuristic urban plaza at dusk. The wet concrete pathway is lined with palm trees in planters and modern benches where NPCs are seated. To the right, a large brick commercial building displays prominent holographic advertisements, while a metal railing separates the walkway from a lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: towering commercial canyon with holographic advertisements and elevated infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward from ground level to focus on the skyline and upper building facades
flying vehicle appears in the sky between the skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to admire the towering architecture and neon-lit skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving between the tall buildings in the distance

entered.detail: sleek modern skyscraper with illuminated vertical lines and glass facade
elevated roadway or monorail track spanning between buildings overhead
cluster of towering buildings with various illuminated signs and window lights

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the imposing skyline of the futuristic city. The security hologram and brick building now dominate the left side of the frame as the camera passes them. To the right, a sleek modern glass tower rises alongside an elevated highway ramp. Flying vehicles traverse the sky between the neon-lit skyscrapers against the deep blue dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a ground-level stroll through a futuristic plaza and ascends to reveal a towering neon skyline. It begins by gliding along a wet concrete pathway lined with palm trees and modern benches, passing a large brick commercial building adorned with holographic advertisements. As the camera moves forward, it tilts upward, shifting the perspective from the pedestrian walkway and metal railings toward the imposing heights of the city. The scene then expands to show a sleek glass tower and an elevated highway ramp rising beside the brick structure. Finally, the view opens fully to the deep blue dusk sky, where flying vehicles traverse the space between glowing skyscrapers.
